name: Huntingdonshire (United Kingdom)
description: A green field with a yellow hunting horn at the centre.
history: Designed in 2009 to recognise the historic county of Huntingdonshire; registered with the Flag Institute on 27 April 2009. The hunting horn refers to the county's name and traditions of royal hunting in the area.

features.symbolism: a canting (punning) reference to the county name 'Huntingdon' and to the historic royal hunting forests in the area
